text: A starting army has been randomly generated for you. Both the lord and units are drawn from the Rogue pool. You may reroll, come back later, or confirm and begin the event loop.
Discard the current army and generate a new random starting force (lord and units are re-randomised).
Close the preview. The current army remains on the map and this event can be reopened at any time via the Mod button.
Confirm the current army and officially begin this Rogue run, proceeding to the first unit reward event.
The test rogue caravan force is ready. Choose one fixed reward unit to verify the formal entry, dilemma flow, unit granting, and state progression.
Add 1 unit generated from the player faction reward pool to this run's rogue force.
Add 1 unit generated from the player faction reward pool to this run's rogue force.
Add 1 unit generated from the current destination faction reward pool to this run's rogue force.
Do not claim a reward now. Close the dilemma and reopen the same reward event through the formal entry.
Do not claim any unit reward this time and continue directly to the next battle event.

The reward has been applied. Generate the fixed Cathay test enemy army and use the formal entry again to open the battle dilemma, then launch a forced battle to verify spawning, war declaration, attack flow, and battle result logging.
Spawn the fixed enemy test army with an embedded Alchemist and immediately force a battle.
Do not spawn the enemy army now. Close the dilemma and reopen the same battle event through the formal entry.

After a battle victory, this run's equipment reward waits for manual claim. Choose 1 item to add to the faction inventory from 4 candidates: weapon, armour, accessory/magic item, plus 1 wildcard pick from any category.
Claim the item generated for this run's weapon reward slot, then continue directly into the destination choice event.
Claim the item generated for this run's armour reward slot, then continue directly into the destination choice event.
Claim the item generated for this run's accessory reward slot, then continue directly into the destination choice event.
Claim the wildcard equipment candidate rolled from any category (weapon, armour, enchanted item, or talisman), then continue directly into the destination choice event.
The equipment reward has been resolved. Choose the next faction-node for this run; later enemy armies and equipment rewards will use the new node faction context.
Travel to the first random faction-node candidate. See the text below this option for the exact faction.
Travel to the second random faction-node candidate. See the text below this option for the exact faction.
Keep the current node unchanged. See the text below this option for the exact faction.
Do not decide the next node now. Close the dilemma and reopen the same destination options through the entry button later.
[[col:yellow]]Keep the current destination candidates and choose again later through the entry button.[[/col]]
Open the current pending event, restore a paused event, or generate the next event in the run.
This round, choose 1 of 3 random heroes from your own faction to join the Rogue force. Taking a hero skips the normal unit reward and proceeds directly to the battle flow.
Claim the first hero shown below. If the army has space, the hero joins this Rogue force and is raised to the current cycle rank.
Claim the second hero shown below. If the army has space, the hero joins this Rogue force and is raised to the current cycle rank.
Claim the third hero shown below. If the army has space, the hero joins this Rogue force and is raised to the current cycle rank.
Close this event and reopen the same hero candidates later from the Mod button.
Skip the hero reward this round and open the normal unit reward event. The usual battle flow continues afterwards.
The current Rogue force already has 20 units, so a hero cannot join. Free up a slot first, or return to the reward page and choose another option.
Return to the previous hero reward candidates.
